title: yucca flaccida var. major
intro: Yucca flaccida var. major, also known as the Adam's needle or needle palm, is a type of plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is a perennial succulent that is native to eastern North America, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, gout, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Yucca flaccida var. major include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support joint health, lower blood pressure, and boost the immune system.
